title: INDEXED BY results in row not being fetched
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (c0 TEXT, c1 INTEGER, c2 DOUBLE PRECISION);
CREATE INDEX i1 ON t1(CAST(c0 AS DECIMAL));
INSERT INTO t1(c0, c1, c2) VALUES ('10', 5, 3.5);
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE CAST(t1.c0 AS DECIMAL) < t1.c1 + 1 GROUP BY t1.rowid;
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE CAST(t1.c0 AS DECIMAL) < t1.c1 + 1 GROUP BY t1.rowid;
key_bug_features: INDEXED BY prevents fetching rows with numeric cast
